justification: All 6 ACs correctly implemented: AC1-AC2 direct mappings, AC3 handles both FAILED and DECLINED, AC4 uses logger.warn (not error) and returns 'unknown', AC5 uses (total_amount / 100).toFixed(2) for correct decimal handling (not integer division), AC6 handles both null and undefined. Tests cover all 6 ACs with 16 cases including AC3 tested with both inputs and AC4 verifying logger.warn. acceptance_criteria_coverage maps all 6 ACs. Logger is injected via makeLogger helper, not global. No external dependencies.

AC6 tests both undefined and null customer_name explicitly
Logger injected via spy-style makeLogger helper, not a global — clean dependency injection
16 tests including edge cases like case-sensitivity, empty string status, and zero amount
acceptance_criteria_coverage present and maps all 6 ACs with test references
